mapper.sql: id, role, provider, display_name, base_url, api_key, model_name, embedding_dimensions, temperature, default_top_k, is_active, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM model_configs WHERE role = #{role} ORDER BY is_active DESC, updated_at DESC
SELECT FROM model_configs WHERE role = #{role} AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO model_configs ( id, role, provider, display_name, base_url, api_key, model_name, embedding_dimensions, temperature, default_top_k, is_active, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{role}, #{provider}, #{displayName}, #{baseUrl}, #{apiKey}, #{modelName}, #{embeddingDimensions}, #{temperature}, #{defaultTopK}, #{active}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET role = excluded.role, provider = excluded.provider, display_name = excluded.display_name, base_url = excluded.base_url, api_key = excluded.api_key, model_name = excluded.model_name, embedding_dimensions = excluded.embedding_dimensions, temperature = excluded.temperature, default_top_k = excluded.default_top_k, is_active = excluded.is_active, updated_at = excluded.updated_at
mapper.update: UPDATE model_configs SET is_active = 0, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE role = #{role}
UPDATE model_configs SET is_active = 1, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM model_configs WHERE role = #{role}

SELECT id, 'CHAT' AS role, provider, display_name, base_url, api_key, chat_model AS model_name, NULL AS embedding_dimensions, temperature, top_k AS default_top_k, 1 AS is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM model_config WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO model_config ( id, provider, display_name, base_url, api_key, chat_model, embedding_model, embedding_dimensions, temperature, top_k, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{provider}, #{displayName}, #{baseUrl}, #{apiKey}, #{modelName}, #{modelName}, #{embeddingDimensions}, #{temperature}, #{defaultTopK}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET provider = excluded.provider, display_name = excluded.display_name, base_url = excluded.base_url, api_key = excluded.api_key, chat_model = excluded.chat_model, embedding_model = excluded.embedding_model, embedding_dimensions = excluded.embedding_dimensions, temperature = excluded.temperature, top_k = excluded.top_k, updated_at = excluded.updated_at
